stories.title: Nebraska Claims Big Ten Championship — Huskers Win Streak Reaches 21

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Nebraska is your 2026 Big Ten Softball Champion! The Huskers beat UCLA to claim the title, extending their win streak to 21 games — the longest active in D-I. Alexis Jensen has been nearly untouchable all week. What a season. #Huskers #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Nebraska wins the Big Ten and now has one of the strongest national seed resumes in the country. 21-game win streak. Conference champion. No. 1 contender with OU out of the picture. Selection Show Sunday, 7 PM ET on ESPN2. #Huskers #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Nebraska Claims 2026 Big Ten Softball Championship, Win Streak Reaches 21

stories.title: Alabama Run-Rules Florida 9-1 — Tide in SEC Championship vs. Texas Today

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text: Alabama RUN-RULED Florida 9-1 in just 5 innings in the SEC semis. Vic Moten: 5 IP, 4 K, 19th win. Ambrey Taylor went deep. Now 49-6, the Tide face Texas in the SEC Championship TODAY. #RollTide #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: Texas Tech 14-0 Over Kansas — Red Raiders in Big 12 Championship

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Texas Tech SCORCHED Kansas 14-0 in the Big 12 softball semis. That is dominance. The Red Raiders are in the Big 12 Championship today. One more win to add a conference title. #WreckEm #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: FSU vs. Virginia Tech — ACC Championship Today After Hokies Stun Duke

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Virginia Tech stunned No. 2 seed Duke 5-0 in the ACC semis. Now the Hokies face No. 1 Florida State in the ACC Championship today at 2:30 PM ET on ESPN. The upset story of tournament week meets the conference's best team. #Hokies #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: Selection Show Sunday — National Seed Race Wide Open Heading Into Championship Saturday

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Selection Show is TOMORROW — Sunday, 7 PM ET on ESPN2. Nebraska is Big Ten champion on a 21-game win streak. Alabama or Texas will be SEC champion. Texas Tech is in the Big 12 final. The No. 1 national seed race is wide open. #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: Championship Saturday — All Four Conference Finals Today

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text: Championship Saturday in softball: Big Ten, SEC, Big 12, and ACC titles all on the line today. Four champions. Four automatic bids. One Selection Show tomorrow night. This is the best day in softball before the bracket drops. #CollegeSoftball
